wait.description: Stop script execution for Time frames, storing the remaining time in the Countdown Variable

loadbyte.description: Assigns Value to Script Register value

loadword.description: Assigns Value to Script Register value

loadbytefromaddr.description: Assigns data in Address offset to Script Register value

writebytetoaddr.description: Assigns Value to the Address offset

setptrbyte.description: Assigns Script Register value to the Address offset

copylocal.description: Assigns Script Register 2 value to Script Register 1 value

copybyte.description: Assigns data in Address 2 to the Address 1 offset

compare_local_to_value.description: Compares Script Register value with Value

compare_local_to_addr.description: Compares Script Register value with data in Address

compare_addr_to_local.description: Compares data in Address with Script Register value

compare_addr_to_value.description: Compares data in Address with Value

compare_addr_to_addr.description: Compares data in Address 1 with data in Address 2

compare_var_to_var.description: Compares Variable 1 value with Variable 2 value

endstd.description: Returns to the invoking script/function after a Common Script

goto.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward

objectgoto.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward, if invoking event has Event ID as ID

directiongoto.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward, if player is looking in Player Direction

call.description: Calls a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward

return.description: Returns to the invoking script/function after a Call

goto_if.description: If Condition in the condition table, jumps to a function

call_if.description: If Condition in the condition table, calls a function

setflagvar.description: Sets the flag whose ID is stored in Flag

clearflagvar.description: Clears the flag whose ID is stored in Flag

checkflagvar.description: Checks if Flag is set and store the result in Variable

settrainerflag.description: Sets the flag of Trainer ID, so marks it as beaten trainer

cleartrainerflag.description: Clears the flag of Trainer ID, so marks it as unbeaten trainer

checktrainerflag.description: Checks if Trainer ID has been beaten

addvar.description: Stores the operation Variable + Operand in Variable

subvar.description: Stores the operation Variable - Operand in Variable

copyvar.description: Assigns value of Variable 2 to Variable 1

setorcopyvar.description: Stores Flexible Value (or its value if Variable) in Variable

non_npc_msg.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file, all at once

npc_msg.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file

non_npc_msg_var.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file

wait_button.description: Waits for button A or button B to be pressed

wait_button_or_walk_away.description: Waits for a button to be pressed

wait_button_or_dpad.description: Waits for button A, button B or pad buttons to be pressed

direction_signpost.description: Prepares an icon board message box displaying Text Slot message, of Type type, and with Icon image if chosen type supports it

SetTextBoard.description: Prepares a text board message box of Type type, and with Icon image if chosen type supports it

ShowBoard.description: Triggers different Process processes for the board

WaitBoard.description: Waits the board last process to end

trainer_tips.description: Displays Text Slot message in the current text box, stores the current text box status in Variable

CloseBoard.description: Returns 1 to Variable if the player has pressed a button so the board must close, 0 otherwise

yesno.description: Opens a Yes-No dialog and stores user response in Variable

MultiStandardText.description: Prepares a multiple selection menu at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with text bank #321, returns selected slot ID in Selection

MultiLocalText.description: Prepares a multiple selection menu at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with local texts, returns selected slot ID in Selection

AddMultiOption.description: Adds an option with Multi Slot ID showing Text Slot text

ShowMulti.description: Shows the prepared multi in screen

ListStandardText.description: Prepares a multiple selection list at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with text bank #321, returns selected slot ID in Selection

ListLocalText.description: Prepares a multiple selection list at X and Y screen position, with Cursor default selected option and possibility of cancelling depending on Cancel, with local texts, returns selected slot ID in Selection

AddListOption.description: Adds a new option to the list, with List Slot ID and showing text line Option MSG. It also displays text line Highlight MSG when that option is highlighted.

ShowList.description: Shows the prepared list in screen

MultiColumn.description: Splits the multi window in Columns different columns

wait_cry.description: Waits the current cry to finish

play_fanfare.description: Pauses current music, then Plays Sound

wait_fanfare.description: Waits for Sound to finish, then resumes music

fade_out_bgm.description: Fades out the current music to Volume in Time frames

fade_in_bgm.description: Fades in the current music to normal volume in Time frames

chatot_has_cry.description: Checks if Chatot has custom sound, stores answer in Variable

chatot_start_recording.description: Starts Chatot microphone record, stores answer in Variable

apply_movement.description: Applies movement at Relative Jump to Event ID

wait_movement.description: Waits for all movements to finish

lockall.description: Locks every event in the map

releaseall.description: Releases every event in the map

show_person.description: Add Event ID overworld in the map

hide_person.description: Removes Event ID overworld from the map

LockCamera.description: Locks the camera at position X and Y

faceplayer.description: Makes the invoking event look at the player

get_player_coords.description: Saves the current player position in X and Y

get_person_coords.description: Saves the current Event ID position in X and Y

KeepOverworld.description: If Value is 1, prevents Event ID from disappearing when entering on a new map header

SetOWMovement.description: Changes the Event ID's movement number to Movement

addmoney.description: Adds Money to the player's money

submoneyimmediate.description: Subtracts Money from the player's money

hasenoughmoneyimmediate.description: Stores 1 into Variable if the player has Money or more money. Stores 0 otherwise.

show_money_box.description: Shows the money box at X and Y coordinates of the screen

update_money_box.description: Updates the current money in the money box

ShowSpecialCurrency.description: Shows the Currency box at X and Y coordinates of the screen.

HideSpecialCurrency.description: Hides the currently displayed special currency box.

UpdateSpecialCurrency.description: Updates the current Currency in the currency box.

get_coin_amount.description: Stores the current casino coin amount in Variable

give_coins.description: Adds Coins to the player's casino coins

take_coins.description: Subtracts Coins from the player's casino coins

give_athlete_points.description: Adds the given Amount to the player's Athlete Points

take_athlete_points.description: Subtracts the given Amount from the player's Athlete Points

check_athlete_points.description: Stores 1 into Variable if the player has the given Amount of Athlete Points or more. Stores 0 otherwise.

giveitem.description: Adds Amount of Item item, stores 1 in Variable if the player had less than 1000 - Amount (100 - Amount if TM/HM), stores 0 otherwise

takeitem.description: Subs Amount of Item item, stores 1 in Variable if the player had at least Amount items in the bag, stores 0 otherwise

hasspaceforitem.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the player has less than 1000 - Amount of Item items (100 - Amount if TM/HM), stores 0 otherwise

hasitem.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the player has at least Amount of Item items in the bag, stores 0 otherwise

itemistmorhm.description: Stores 1 in Variable if Item is TM or HM, stores 0 otherwise

getitempocket.description: Stores the bag pocket of Item in Variable

set_starter_choice.description: Stores Pokémon as the starting Pokémon in the game save data

gender_msgbox.description: Displays Male Text or Female Text message depending on player's gender

get_seal_quantity.description: Checks the number of a certain type of Ball Seals that the player has. The Variable is the output of how many Seals you have.

give_random_seal.description: Generates three random types of Ball Seals and gives them to the player (repeats are possible). Each Variable will yield a 0 if the player has no more room for the Seal(s) in the Seal Case.

CheckPokemonForm.description: Checks the form of the Pokemon in party slot Party Position and returns the form ID in Variable.

give_mon.description: Gives Pokémon at level Level, store 1 in Variable if succeed and 0 otherwise

give_egg.description: Gives a Pokémon egg received from Location text slot at text bank #281

set_mon_move.description: Overwrites Move Slot of the Pokémon at the specified Party Slot with Move ID.

mon_has_move.description:
Checks if a Pokémon at the specified Party Slot knows a move with given Move ID.
Stores 1 into Variable if yes, 0 otherwise.

get_party_slot_with_move.description: Checks if any Pokémon in the party knows Move ID move, stores in Variable the position of the first Pokémon that knows it or stores 6 if no Pokémon in the party knows the move

get_phone_book_rematch.description: Stores 1 in Var if rematch is active, stores 0 otherwise.

name_rival.description: Opens the keyboard for naming the rival, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels the proccess

get_friend_sprite.description:
Stores 97 (Lyra sprite ID) into the Variable if you're playing as Ethan;
Stores 0 (Ethan sprite ID) into the Variable if you're playing as Lyra.

register_pokegear_card.description: Adds the worldmap to the Pokegear if Module is 1, adds the radio if Module is 2

check_registered_phone_number.description: Stores 0 into Variable if Phone Number has not been registered, and 1 if it has been registered.

hof_credits.description: If Location is 0, Hall of Fame and Credits sequence plays -- used for Indigo Plateau. If Location is 1, only the Credits sequence plays -- used for Mt. Silver battle against Red

choose_starter.description: Opens the starter Pokémon selection screen

name_player.description: Opens the keyboard for naming the player, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels the proccess

nickname_input.description: Opens the keyboard for naming a Pokémon in Party Position, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels the proccess

fade_screen.description: Fades screen to chosen 15-bit Color, using the chosen Fade Style. The transition will render Frame Count images, of Duration length each.

wait_fade.description: Waits for the screen fade to end

warp.description: Warps to X and Y position of Map header with initial Dir direction, using Door warp

rock_climb.description: Uses rock climb with the Pokémon at Party Position position

surf.description: Uses surf with the Pokémon at Party Position position

waterfall.description: Uses waterfall with the Pokémon at Party Position position

FlyAnimation.description: Flies to Map header map, to coordinates X and Y

flash_effect.description: Sets weather to 12 (darkness after flash) and then updates the weather graphics

whirlpool.description: Uses whirlpool with the Pokémon at Party Position position

CutAnimation.description: Displays the Hidden Machine summon animation with the Pokémon at Party Position position

player_on_bike_check.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player is riding the bike, stores 0 otherwise

player_on_bike_set.description: Changes player form from normal to riding the bike if Action is 1, otherwise it sets the normal form to the player

set_bike_state_lock.description: If Action is 1, the game sets the cycling road flag and moves the player down. Otherwise the flag is deactivated.

get_player_state.description: Stores in Variable the current player form

set_avatar_bits.description: Activates the Form bit in the internal player form data

update_avatar_state.description: Updates changes in the internal player form data in the screen

buffer_players_name.description: Stores player's name in String Buffer

buffer_rivals_name.description: Stores rival's name in String Buffer

buffer_friends_name.description: Stores counterpart's name in String Buffer

buffer_mon_species_name.description: Stores the name of the Pokémon in Party Position in String Buffer

buffer_item_name.description: Stores Item's name in String Buffer

buffer_pocket_name.description: Stores Pocket's name in String Buffer

buffer_tmhm_move_name.description: Stores the name of the move contained in Item TM/HM in String Buffer

buffer_move_name.description: Stores battle Move's name in String Buffer

buffer_int.description: Stores a Number in String Buffer

bufferpartymonnick.description: Stores the nickname of the Pokémon in Party Position in String Buffer

buffer_player_union_avatar_class_name.description: Stores player's Union Room trainer type in String Buffer

buffer_species_name.description: Stores Pokémon's name in String Buffer

buffer_starter_species_name.description: Stores the name of the player' starter Pokémon in String Buffer

buffer_dppt_rival_starter_species_name.description: Stores the name of the rival' starter Pokémon in String Buffer

buffer_dppt_friend_starter_species_name.description: Stores the name of the counterpart' starter Pokémon in String Buffer

get_starter_choice.description: Stores the starter Pokémon ID in Variable

buffer_decoration_name.description: Loads an empty string in String Buffer

buffer_map_sec_name.description: Stores Map header name in String Buffer

GetSwarmInfo.description: Selects a zone depending on a random seed, then stores the zone ID in Map and the corresponding swarm Pokémon of that zone in Pokémon

get_trainer_num.description: Stores the trainer ID number in Variable depending on the script ID

trainer_battle.description: Starts a battle against Trainer 1 and, if Trainer 2 is neither 0 nor the same as Trainer 1, a double battle against both. Continues without warping to Pokemon Center/home if Result is equal to 1.

trainer_message.description: Displays the text of Trainer ID trainer at condition Type

get_trainer_msg_params.description: If the script ID corresponds to a single battle trainer, stores 0 in Noticing, 2 in Defeat and 0 in One Pokémon. If it corresponds to a double battle, stores 3, 5 and 6 or 7, 9 and 10 depending on whether it's the first or the second trainer

get_rematch_msg_params.description: If the script ID corresponds to a single battle trainer, stores 17 in Noticing, 0 in Defeat and 0 in One Pokémon. If it corresponds to a double battle, stores 18, 0 and 6 or 19, 0 and 10 depending on whether it's the first or the second trainer

trainer_is_double_battle.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the script ID corresponds to a single battle, stores 1 if it corresponds to a double battle

white_out.description: Return to Pokémon Center or player's house after being defeated

check_battle_won.description: Stores 0 in Variable if player has been defeated in battle, stores 1 otherwise

static_wild_won_or_caught.description: Stores 0 in Variable if player defeated or catched the wild Pokemon, stores 1 otherwise

party_check_for_double.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has at least 2 not fainted Pokémon, stores 0 otherwise

scrcmd_223.description: Starts a battle against trainer with ID 1

scrcmd_224.description: Sets the trainer flag with the same ID as the invoking event

goto_if_trainer_defeated.description: Jumps to a function, Relative Jump bytes forward or backward, if trainer flag with the invoking event ID is set

party_has_pokerus.description: Stores 1 in Variable if one or more Pokémon in the party are infected with the Pokérus

mon_get_gender.description: Stores 0 in Variable if Pokémon at Party Position is male, 1 if is female and 2 if gender is unknown

get_dynamic_warp_floor_no.description: Stores in Variable the current floor in a elevator

elevator_cur_floor_box.description: Shows the current floor number in a box at X and Y coordinates in the screen

count_johto_dex_seen.description: Stores in Variable the total seen Pokemon in the Johto Pokédex

count_johto_dex_owned.description: Stores in Variable the total obtained Pokemon in the Johto Pokédex

count_national_dex_seen.description: Stores in Variable the total seen Pokemon in the National Pokédex

count_national_dex_owned.description: Stores in Variable the total obtained Pokemon in the National Pokédex

get_dex_eval_result.description: Checks the number of seen Pokémon in the Johto Pokédex (if Mode is 0) or the number of obtained Pokémon in the National Pokédex (otherwise) and stores the corresponding Professor message in Message, also storing 0x4AA in Unknown

rocket_trap_battle.description: Starts a wild battle against a Pokémon of level Level

WildBattleNoButtons.description: Starts a first wild battle against a Pokémon of level Level

get_save_file_state.description: Stores 0 in Variable if a different savegame exists and it's not possible to save, stores 1 if no previous savegame exists, stores 2 if game has to save a lot of data and stores 3 if game can perform a quick save

mart_buy.description: Opens the common mart shopping screen

special_mart_buy.description: Opens the Mart ID mart shopping screen

decoration_mart.description: Opens the Mart ID goods mart shopping screen

seal_mart.description: Opens the Mart ID seal mart shopping screen

overworld_white_out.description: Return to Pokémon Center or player's house after being defeated

set_spawn.description: Sets the player's last warp as Warp ID. This affects Fly, whiting out, Escape Rope, etc.

get_player_gender.description: Stores 0 in Variable if player is male, stores 1 if female

heal_party.description: Heals every Pokémon in the player's party

buffer_union_room_avatar_choices.description: Generates the four Union Room Trainer class options based on Trainer ID and gender into String Buffers 0, 1, 2, and 3

union_room_avatar_idx_to_trainer_class.description: Returns the Trainer class that the player chose for the Union Room to Variable based on the Choice

SetUnionRoomSprite.description: Sets the player Trainer class sprite for the Union Room as determined by CheckUnionRoomTrainerSprite

check_pokedex.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the Pokédex, stores 0 otherwise

give_pokedex.description: Gives the Pokédex to the player

check_running_shoes.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the running shoes, stores 0 otherwise

give_running_shoes.description: Gives the running shoes to the player

check_badge.description: Checks if player has Badge ID badge, stores result in Variable

give_badge.description: Gives the player Badge ID badge

count_badges.description: Stores in Variable the number of badges obtained

scrcmd_297.description: Stores 1 in Variable if flag 0x960 is set, stores 0 otherwise

check_escort_mode.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the following event flag is activated, stores 0 otherwise

set_escort_mode.description: Activates the following event flag, so you can no longer use the bike, surf, rock climb...

clear_escort_mode.description: Deactivates the following event flag, so you can use the bike, surf, rock climb... again

scrcmd_305.description: Stores 1 in Variable if flag 0x964 is set, stores 0 otherwise

DoorAnimation.description: Prepares a building located at Map X and Map Y coordinates in a map located at Matrix X and Matrix Y in the current matrix for animation, with Door ID animation ID

WaitDoor.description: Wait animation of building with Door ID animation ID

FreeDoor.description: Free animation of building with Door ID animation ID

OpenDoor.description: Triggers first animation of building with Door ID animation ID

CloseDoor.description: Triggers second animation of building with Door ID animation ID

buffer_day_care_mon_nicks.description: Stores first daycare Pokémon nickname in string buffer 0, the second daycare Pokémon nickname in string buffer 1 and the first Pokémon trainer's name in buffer 2

get_day_care_state.description: If daycare Pokémon have an egg, stores 1 in Variable. Otherwise it stores 0 if no Pokémon is in the daycare, 2 if only one Pokémon is in the daycare or 3 if there are two Pokémon

CMD_315.description: ??? Something to do with the Goldenrod Dept. Store Basement, probably moving around blocks or opening access to doors.

violet_gym_init.description: Initializes Violet Gym internal data and 3D model animations

violet_gym_elevator.description: Triggers model #111 to move up or down

get_party_count.description: Stores in Variable the current number of Pokémon in the party

BagScreen.description: Opens up the Bag screen with the user only being able to select an item from the specified pocket. WARNING: this command is nonfunctional after opening the Bag -- you will be unable to select anything.

move_person.description: Sets Event ID spawn position to global coords X and Y

move_person_facing.description: Moves Event ID to global coords X, Y, Z with Dir direction

set_object_movement_type.description: Sets Event ID's default move code to Movement ID

set_object_facing.description: Sets Event ID's default direction to Direction ID

move_warp.description: Moves Warp ID to global coords X and Y

move_bg_event.description: Moves Spawnable ID to global coords X and Y

SetOWDirection.description: Sets Event ID's current direction to Direction ID

wait_button_or_delay.description: Stops script execution until Time frames have passed or until user presses A or B buttons

party_select_ui.description: Opens up the UI to select a Pokémon from the party

get_party_selection.description: Stores in Variable the selected party slot in a party Pokémon screen, or 0xFF is user cancelled the selection

pokemon_summary_screen.description: If Menu is 1, open the summary screen on the learn/forget move UI; otherwise, open the Pokemon summary screen

get_move_selection.description: Returns the selected move slot to Variable. Returns 4 if the player cancels

get_partymon_species.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the Pokémon at Party Position

partymon_is_mine.description: Stores 0 in Variable if trainer ID and secret ID of the Pokémon at Party Position are the player's ones, stores 1 otherwise

party_count_not_egg.description: Stores in Variable the number of Pokémon in the Pokémon party, excluding the eggs

count_alive_mons.description: Stores in Variable how many alive Pokémon are in the party, except for the chosen Party Position

count_alive_mons_and_pc.description: Stores in Variable the number of Pokémon in the Pokémon party and PC boxes, excluding the eggs and fainted Pokémon

party_count_egg.description: Stores in Variable the number of eggs in the Pokémon party

submoneyvar.description: Subtracts Money from the player's money

give_loan_mon.description: Gives you Pokémon at Level with Header name on the summary screen. Used for NPC-given Pokémon

return_loan_mon.description: Deletes the Pokémon at Party Position from the party

hasenoughmoneyvar.description: Returns 1 to Variable if the player has Money or more money, returns 0 otherwise

egg_hatch_anim.description: Opens the egg hatching screen with an egg in the Pokémon party that has 0 steps left for hatching

buffer_day_care_mon_growth.description: Stores the amount of levels a Pokémon in the Daycare has gained from being in the Daycare

UnvanishOverworld.description: Makes Event ID visible again if it was invisible

make_object_visible.description: Makes Event ID invisible, but still collisionable

CountMail.description: Stores in Variable the current amount of mails in the mailbox

GetTimePeriod.description: Stores in Variable the current time period of the day

random.description: Generates a random number between 0 and Range - 1, and stores it in Variable

scrcmd_381.description: Generates a random number between 0 and Range - 1, and stores it in Variable

mon_get_friendship.description: Stores in Variable the happiness of Pokémon in Party Position

mon_add_friendship.description: Adds Happiness to the happiness of Pokémon in Party Position

mon_subtract_friendship.description: Subs Happiness to the happiness of Pokémon in Party Position

get_player_facing.description: Stores in Variable the direction the player is looking at

player_has_species.description: Stores 1 in Variable if Pokémon is currently in the Pokémon party, stores 0 otherwise

size_record_compare.description: Stores 0 in Variable if Pokémon at Party Position does not have a bigger relative size than player's record, stores 1 if it's the same size and stores 2 if it has a bigger relative size

size_record_update.description: Stores the relative size of Pokémon at Party Position as player's record

buffer_mon_size.description: Stores the Integer part of Pokémon at Party Position size in Integer String Buffer (1 to 3 digits) and the decimal part of the size in Decimal String Buffer (1 digit)

buffer_record_size.description: Stores the Integer part of player's record size, normalized to Pokémon ID range, in Integer String Buffer (1 to 3 digits) and the decimal part of the size in Decimal String Buffer (1 digit)

count_mon_moves.description: Stores in Variable the total amount of moves that the Pokémon at Party Position currently has

mon_forget_move.description: Deletes the move in Move Slot from the Pokémon at Party Position

mon_get_move.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the move in Move Slot from the Pokémon at Party Position

buffer_party_mon_move_name.description: Stores the name of the move in Move Slot from the Pokémon at Party Position in String Buffer

strength_flag_action.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Disables Strength so player can no longer move boulders
1: Allows the player to automatically move Strength boulders
2: Checks if Strength is activated, store answer in Variable

variants.desc: Disables Strength so player can no longer move boulders
Allows the player to automatically move Strength boulders
Checks if Strength is activated, store answer in Variable

flash_action.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
 0: Clears the Flash system flag
 1: Sets the Flash system flag
 2: Checks if Flash is activated, store answer in Variable

variants.desc: Clears the Flash system flag
Sets the Flash system flag
Checks if Flash is activated, store answer in Variable

defog_action.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
 0: Clears the Defog system flag
 1: Sets the Defog system flag
 2: Checks if Defog is activated, store answer in Variable

variants.desc: Clears the Defog system flag
Sets the Defog system flag
Checks if Defog is activated, store answer in Variable

check_johto_dex_complete.description: Stores 1 in Variable if every Pokémon in the Johto Pokédex has been seen, stores 0 otherwise

check_national_dex_complete.description: Stores 1 in Variable if every Pokémon in the National Pokédex has been caught, stores 0 otherwise

countfossils.description: Stores in Variable the current amount of fossils in the bag

run_phone_call.description: Starts the PokéGear phone call that was previously set.

getfossilpokemon.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the Pokémon to which Item ID fossil belongs

getfossilminimumamount.description: Stores in Item ID the ID of the first fossil item in the bag that the player has at least Amount quantity of, and stores in Position the amount of fossils in the bag before the first fossil that met the quantity condition

party_count_mons_at_or_below_level.description: Stores in Variable the amount of Pokémon in party whose level is equal or lower than Level

survive_poisoning.description: If Pokémon at Party Position is poisoned and at 1 HP, it cures the poison and stores 1 in Variable, otherwise it stores 0

get_std_msg_naix.description: If Archive Number exists in the array, return the number of the text archive in Result; otherwise, return 0. E.g.: in Cameron the Photographer scripts, ``GetCommonMessageArchive 2 0x800C`` is used, then followed up with ``MessageFromArchive 0x800C X``; the 2 refers to the entry in the array in the Notes to the right of this box, and because number 2 is text archive 30 in the array, the command returns 30 to 0x800C. It then loads text archive 30 and displays message X when followed by the ``MessageFromArchive 0x800C X``

msgbox_extern.description: Loads Message ID in text archive Archive Number

GetPreviousHeaderID.description: Stores in Variable the header ID of the previous accessed map

GetCurrentHeaderID.description: Stores in Variable the header ID of the map the player is currently on

safari_zone_action.description: If Flag is 0 safari encounters are activated, if Flag is 1 safari encounters are deactivated, being the own safari encounters if Mode is 0 or using the Safari Zone link if 1

ShowPokemonPic.description: Opens a window with the picture of Pokémon with Gender gender and registers the Pokémon in the Pokédex as seen

HidePokemonPic.description: Hides the window of a Pokémon picture

DisablePokegearRematch.description: The Trainer will no longer seek a rematch until the criteria for rematching them is fulfilled again

create_roamer.description: Activates a roaming Pokémon depending on the ID

UnionGroup.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Checks if group ID exists, returns answer in Variable
1: Checks if group ID is accesible, returns answer in Variable
2: Writes group ID name in String Buffer
3: Writes leader's name of Group ID in String Buffer
4: Opens keyboard, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels, 2 if group name already exists, 0 otherwise
5: Enter in group ID
6: Creates a group
7: ???

variants.desc: Checks if group ID exists, returns answer in Variable
Checks if group ID is accesible, returns answer in Variable
Writes group ID name in String Buffer
Writes leader's name of Group ID in String Buffer
Opens keyboard, stores 1 in Variable if user cancels, 2 if group name already exists, 0 otherwise
Enter in group ID
Creates a group

CheckHasLearnableMoves.description: Returns 0 to Var if the Pokémon has no learnable moves in its learnset at that level.

get_offered_species.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the offered Pokémon of the current trade data

npc_trade_get_req_species.description: Stores in Variable the ID of the requested Pokémon of the current trade data

npc_trade_exec.description: Opens the trade Pokémon screen, giving the Pokémon at Party Position and receiving the offered Pokémon of the current trade data

npc_trade_end.description: Frees the current trade data from the memory

nat_dex_flag_action.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
1: Activates the National Pokédex mode
2: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the National Pokédex, otherwise it stores 0

mon_get_ribbon_count.description: Stores in Variable the amount of ribbons that the Pokémon in Party Position has

party_get_ribbon_count.description: Stores in Variable the total amount of different ribbons in the current Pokémon party

mon_has_ribbon.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the Pokémon in Party Position has the Ribbon ribbon, stores 0 otherwise

give_ribbon.description: Gives the Ribbon ribbon to Pokémon in Party Position

buffer_ribbon_name.description: Stores the name of the Ribbon in String Buffer

get_ev_total.description: Stores in Variable the total amount of effort values of Pokémon in Party Position

get_weekday.description: Stores in Variable the current day of the week

pokecen_anim.description: Triggers the Pokémon Center healing animation with PokéBalls number of player's Pokémon

elevator_anim.description: Triggers the animation of building #208 down (if Direction is 0) or up (if Direction is 1) Count consecutive times

mystery_gift.description:
Function depends on the first parameter:
0: Initializes the data for receiving a Mystery Gift
1: Checks if there is a Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
2: Stores the Mystery Gift ID in Variable
3: Checks if player can receive the Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
4: Gives the Mystery Gift to the player
5: Shows the succeed text at Text File file and Text Line slot
6: Shows the unable text at Text File file and Text Line slot
7: Ends the Mystery Gift process
8: Saves data and ends the Mystery Gift process

variants.desc: Initializes the data for receiving a Mystery Gift
Checks if there is a Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
Stores the Mystery Gift ID in Variable
Checks if player can receive the Mystery Gift, stores answer in Variable
Gives the Mystery Gift to the player
Shows the succeed text at Text File file and Text Line slot
Shows the unable text at Text File file and Text Line slot
Ends the Mystery Gift process
Saves data and ends the Mystery Gift process

prompt_easy_chat.description: Opens up the Easy Chat UI. Returns 0 if Cancel is selected

get_game_version.description: Returns 0x7 to Variable if game is HeartGold, 0x8 if SoulSilver

get_party_lead.description: Stores in Variable the slot of the first Pokémon in the party that is not an egg

get_mon_types.description: Return Type 1 and Type 2 of the Pokémon in Party Position in Variables

primo_password_check_1.description: Determines if the given responses for Primo's Easy Chat will give a wallpaper. Returns 255 to Result if ??? and the following command should be used to check for Eggs, or 0 to Result if the bonus wallpapers are already unlocked. Otherwise, give a random bonus wallpaper

loto_id_get.description: Stores Lotto random number in Variable

loto_id_search.description:
Takes a Winning Number as input and responds as follows.
If no matching Pokémon could be found or an error occurs: 
MatchPos: 0; Digits: 0; PC: 0.

For all other cases:

If the matching Pokémon is in the Player's party, PC will be assigned 0.
Otherwise, if it's in the Player's Storage System, PC will be assigned 1.

MatchPos stores the zero-based position of the winning Pokémon (either as Party pos or Storage System pos, depending on the value of PC).

When there's a match, the Digits var is assigned the number of matching digits of the Winning Pokémon's PID.
In case of multiple matches, priority is always given to the one with the most matching digits.

loto_id_set.description: Generates two random numbers and assigns them to two system lottery Variables.

count_pc_empty_space.description: Stores in Variable the amount of free Pokémon slots in PC boxes

add_special_game_stat.description: Adds Score to the Trainer Score seen on the Trainer Card

buffer_fashion_name.description: Stores Accesory's name in String Buffer

CheckPokemonInParty.description: Stores 1 in Variable if Pokémon (or its egg) is currently in the Pokémon party, stores 0 otherwise

SetDeoxysForm.description: Sets every Deoxys in the Pokémon party the Form form

CheckBurmyForms.description: Stores in Variable the number of current different Burmy forms in the Pokémon party

GetHour.description: Stores current hour from RTC in Variable

ShakeOverworld.description: Makes Event ID overworld shake Count times in Time frames, moving X horizontally and Y vertically each shake

CheckRegis.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has the 3 Regis in the party, stores 0 otherwise

MessageUnown.description: Display line Text Slot from the text file with the Unown font

CheckGBACartidge.description: Stores the current GBA cartridge ID in Variable

get_party_lead_alive.description: Stores in Variable the slot of the first Pokémon in the party that is not an egg nor is fainted

SetMatrixAlternativeMap.description: Permanently changes a worldmap matrix cell corresponding to Alternative ID if Status is 1, reverts the change if 0

check_coins_immediate.description: Stores 1 in Result if player has at least Coins coins, stores 0 otherwise

CheckGiveCoins.description: Stores 1 in Result if player can receive Coins coins (i.e. it won't exceed the cap), stores 0 otherwise

CheckVar4041.description: Stores 1 in Result if Var 0x4041 is set to 1, stores 0 otherwise

mon_get_level.description: Stores into Result the level of the Pokémon at a given Party Slot.

buffer_int_ex.description: Stores a Number in String Buffer with Alignment Type alignment and Digits length

CheckBirthday.description: Stores 1 in Variable if the current day is the player's birthday, stores 0 otherwise

MusicVolumeSet.description: Identifies the BGM Player which is playing Music ID and sets its Volume

CountSeenUnown.description: Stores in Variable the number of different seen Unown forms

check_battle_points.description: Returns 0 in Result if you do not have enough battle points

CheckUnionRoomTrainerSprite.description: Returns the Trainer sprite corresponding to the Trainer class selection for the Union Room to Variable depending on the Choice.

HiddenMachineEffect.description: Begins the Hidden Machine effect. Variable is set to 1 when the effect is complete.

screen_shake.description: Shakes the screen vertically and/or horizontally, moving the camera X Magnitude pixels horizontally and Y Magnitude pixels vertically in each shake, with Count total shakes of Time frames each one

multi_battle.description: Starts a double battle with Partner Trainer ID versus Trainer 1 ID and Trainer 2 ID

PartyPokemonTradeScreen.description: Opens the party Pokémon screen for a trade

GetOWMovement.description: Returns Overworld ID's movement ID to Result

buffer_seal_name.description: Stores Seal's singular noun in String Buffer

party_legal_check.description: Checks legality of party, at least for WIFI stuff. If RESULT is 1, party check failed and you have an "illegal" mon

wild_battle.description: Starts a wild battle against a Pokémon of level Level, and shiny if Shiny Flag is 1

get_trcard_stars.description: Stores in Variable the current trainer card level

show_save_stats.description: Displays the save data box (current map name, player's name, the amount of badges, the Pokédex counter and the play time)

ScopeMode.description: If Mode is 1, activates the scope mode, otherwise the command deactivates the scope mode

GetFollowingPokeSize.description: Stores 0 in Variable if the current following Pokémon is small and can follow the player indoors, stores 1 if it's big and can't follow the player indoors

FollowingPokePCAnimation.description: Triggers the animation of sending the current following Pokémon back to its PokéBall over the Pokémon Center healing counter

SendBackFollowingPoke.description: Triggers the animation of sending the current following Pokémon back to its PokéBall and deactivates the following Pokémon until the game is reset or a warp is used

follow_mon_face_player.description: Makes the invoking event look at the player, but with a size limitation

toggle_following_pokemon_movement.description: Releases the following Pokemon animation if Operation is 0, locks the animation otherwise

wait_following_pokemon_movement.description: Waits the following Pokemon to end its last movement

following_pokemon_movement.description: Changes the following Pokemon default movement to Move Code

SetFollowingPokePosition.description: Moves the following Pokémon to one tile Position next to player and facing at Direction

BallResetFollowingPoke.description: Moves the following Pokémon to the current player's position, and triggers the animation of sending the Pokémon out of its PokéBall after the player walks a step

NoBallResetFollowingPoke.description: Moves the following Pokémon to the current player's position

SendOutFollowingPoke.description: Triggers the animation of sending the first non-fainted Pokémon out of its PokéBall and spawns it on the last player position

GetOWDirection.description: Stores in Variable the current direction which Event ID is facing

anim_apricorn_tree.description: Returns 0 to Variable if there is no Apricorn on the tree (references 0x800D, aka the last interacted-with object/NPC)

apricorn_tree_get_apricorn.description: Returns Apricorn type to Variable based on the pre-defined array of trees in the Notes column. For example, the white Apricorn from Azalea Town would return 6 to Variable. Defaults to 1 for red Apricorn if undefined

give_apricorn_from_tree.description: Gives Apricorn of Quantity if current Apricorn count in the box plus Quantity is <= 99. Returns 0 to Var if Apricorn count = 99 to stop the player from obtaining more than 99

buffer_apricorn_name.description: Stores Apricorn Name in String Buffer

get_party_slot_with_species.description: Checks party for the presence of a Pokemon, and returns which slot they are in.

GetTutorPageQuantity.description: Checks the number of pages to display for the tutors in Frontier Access. Returns 0 if there are no learnable moves, 1 if the number of learnable moves is <= 7, else (((number of learnable moves)/6)+1)

move_tutor_choose_move.description: Choose a move for the Pokémon in Party Slot from Tutor on Page and returns the selected move slot from the list to Variable. Variable equals 0xFFFD if the NEXT button was selected, or 0xFFFE if the player cancels teaching a move

CheckHeadbuttCompatibility.description: Stores 1 into Variable if the Pokémon at the given Party Slot can learn Headbutt.

GetCurrentMusic.description: Returns the currently playing BGM to Variable

getitemquantity.description: Returns quantity of Item to Result

get_static_encounter_outcome.description: Checks the outcome of a static encounter, like Mewtwo in Cerulean Cave, and stores the result in Variable

GetCurrentWeather.description: Stores the current weather in Variable

follower_poke_is_event_trigger.description: Checks if the Pokémon in Party Position matches the criteria for the Event. Stores 1 in Var if true.

FloorTrapAnimation.description: Triggers Team Rocket HQ trap-floor's graphical effect in the player's current position

follow_mon_interact.description: The following Pokémon triggers a random movement, and then a random following message

alph_puzzle.description: Loads the stone-panel puzzle of Puzzle ID.

open_alph_hidden_room.description: Something to do with the secret room, not the puzzle trapdoor.

BoatAnimation.description: Plays the S.S. Aqua animation of leaving the port. Animation is either 0 or 1, with 0 being Olivine and 1 being Vermilion. X and Y coordinates are for the destination map

get_follow_poke_party_index.description: Returns the following Pokémon's party slot to Variable. Crashes if there are no alive Pokémon in the party

FollowingPokeFlash.description: Makes the following Pokémon flash white

CheckPokemonAlive.description: Checks if player has at least 1 not fainted Pokémon, stores the result in Variable

CheckFollowingPoke.description: Checks if player has a following Pokémon, stores the result in Variable. Returns False if you have a following Pokémon

AdjustFollowingPokeMood.description: Increases or decreases following Pokémon mood with a signed 8-bit Integer. Maximum values are 127 and -127

GetBornPokemonPartyPos.description: Checks if the following Pokémon's type matches Type. Returns True if so

FollowingPokeJump.description: Makes the following Pokémon jump in place Jumps number of times

CheckKurtApricorn.description: Checks if Kurt currently has an Apricorn for turning into a ball. If Result is 1, Kurt has an Apricorn already.

GetApricornBallID.description: Gets the ID of the Ball Kurt has made and returns it to Var

get_total_apricorn_count.description: Returns how many total Apricorns you have to Var

touchscreen_menu_hide.description: Changes the low screen design to the green Pokéball background

touchscreen_menu_show.description: Sets the default low screen design

getmenuchoice.description: Opens a Yes-No selection, stores player's answer in Variable

menu_init_std_gmm.description: Prepares a multiple selection menu with text bank #191, returns selected slot ID in Selection

menu_init.description: Prepares a multiple selection menu with local texts, returns selected slot ID in Selection. If Close Status is 1, pressing B will automatically select the last option in the list.

menu_item_add.description: Adds a box with Multi Box Slot ID showing Text Slot text on the bottom screen and Top Screen Text on the top in a message box. Text depends on whether you use MultiTouchStandardText or MultiTouchLocalText

RockSmashItemCheck.description: Checks if an item was generated after using Rock Smash. If Following Poke Status is 0, the bonus granted from the following Pokémon being present is not granted. If an item is generated, Result equals TRUE. The item is returned to Item

try_headbutt_encounter.description: Tries to generate a Headbutt encounter. If an encounter is generated, Variable is set to TRUE

cinematic.description:
Renders a cutscene
0 = Ho-Oh appearing from the sky
1 = Lugia bursting out of the waterfall
2 = Arceus stock image cutscene

show_legendary_wing.description: Shows the Rainbow Wing (0) or the Silver Wing (1) above the player

give_togepi_egg.description: Gives an egg containing a Togepi that knows Extrasensory

give_spiky_ear_pichu.description: Gives the player a Pichu in Spiky-Eared form

radio_music_is_playing.description: Stores 1 in Result if the current Seq is playing from the Pokégear radio. Stores 0 otherwise.

set_follow_mon_inhibit_state.description:
0 = Following Pokémon allowed
1 = Following Pokémon unallowed

script_overlay_cmd.description: If Action is 0, load an overlay from the list in the Notes column. Otherwise, unload the overlay

bug_contest_action.description: If Action is 0, check to initialize the Bug Catching Contest based on Day. Otherwise, end the Bug Catching Contest

buffer_bug_contest_winner.description: Stores the name of the person that placed in rank Rank. If the player places at rank Rank, the player's name is stored in string buffer 0. If another Trainer places at rank Rank, the Trainer Class and Trainer name are stored in string buffers 2 and 0 respectively. The obtained Pokemon is stored in string buffer 1, and the score is stored in string buffer 3

judge_bug_contest.description: Generates the results of the Bug Catching Contest

buffer_bug_contest_mon_nick.description: Stores the name of the captured bug from the Bug Catching Contest in String Buffer. Returns 1 to Variable if the party is already full

TextBugContestRemainingTime.description: Stores remaining time in the Bug Catching Contest in String Buffer

is_npc_bug_contestant_registered.description: Checks if the Participant is participating in the Bug Catching Contest. Returns 1 if true to Variable.

ShowMomMoney.description: Shows mom savings money box at X and Y coordinates of the screen

UpdateTownMap.description:
Updates the town map to include Kanto
1 = Normal, Johto-only view
2 = Whole map, Kanto included

mom_gift_check.description: Checks if there is currently a gift from Mom to be picked up

get_partymon_form.description: Checks what form Pokémon at Party Slot position has. The Variable stores the form ID.

CheckFollowingPokeNextToPlayer.description: Checks if the following Pokémon is next to the player in any direction

CheckJadeOrbRequirements.description: Stores 1 in Variable if player has both Kyogre and Groudon in the Pokémon party and they have been caught in Johto, stores 0 otherwise

buffer_item_name_indef.description: Stores Item's lowercase name in String Buffer

buffer_item_name_plural.description: Stores Item's plural noun in String Buffer

buffer_party_mon_species_name_indef.description: Stores the name of the Pokémon in Party Position in String Buffer with default color tags encoding

buffer_trainer_class_name_indef.description: Stores Trainer class' lowercase noun in String Buffer

buffer_seal_name_plural.description: Stores Seal's plural noun in String Buffer

capitalize.description: Capitalizes the string currently stored in String Buffer

buffer_dept_store_floor_no.description: Stores Floor's name in String Buffer

WalkSlowerNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowerSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowerWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowerEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkSlowNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkSlowSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkSlowWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkSlowEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkNormalNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkNormalSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkNormalWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkNormalEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkFastNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFastSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFastWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFastEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkFasterNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkFasterSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkFasterWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkFasterEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowerEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 32 frames; Equivalent to 0.94 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotSlowEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotNormalNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotNormalSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotNormalWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotNormalEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second. This should be taken as the standard speed.

WalkOnSpotFastNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFastSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFastWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFastEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 7.5 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterNorth.description: Event faces up and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterSouth.description: Event faces down and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterWest.description: Event faces left and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

WalkOnSpotFasterEast.description: Event faces right and moves on the spot at 1 tile per 2 frames; Equivalent to 15 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowWest.description: Event faces left and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotSlowEast.description: Event faces right and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastWest.description: Event faces left and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpOnSpotFastEast.description: Event faces right and jumps on the spot at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps northwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps southwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastWest.description: Event faces left and jumps westwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpNearFastEast.description: Event faces right and jumps eastwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second.

JumpFarNorth.description: Event faces up and jumps 2 tiles northwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

JumpFarSouth.description: Event faces down and jumps 2 tiles southwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

JumpFarWest.description: Event faces left and jumps 2 tiles westwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

JumpFarEast.description: Event faces right and jumps 2 tiles eastwards at 1 tile per 8 frames; Equivalent to 3.75 tiles per second; 16 frames in total.

Delay1.description: Event waits for 1 frame; Equivalent to ~0.033 seconds (1/30s).

Delay2.description: Event waits for 2 frames; Equivalent to ~0.067 seconds (2/30s).

Delay4.description: Event waits for 4 frames; Equivalent to ~0.133 seconds (4/30s).

Delay8.description: Event waits for 8 frames; Equivalent to ~0.267 seconds (8/30s).

Delay15.description: Event waits for 15 frames; Equivalent to 0.5 seconds (15/30s).

Delay16.description: Event waits for 16 frames; Equivalent to ~0.533 seconds (16/30s).

Delay32.description: Event waits for 32 frames; Equivalent to ~1.067 seconds (32/30s).

WarpOut.description: Makes overworld ascend to the sky. No rotation involved.

WarpIn.description: Makes overworld fall from the sky. No rotation involved.

SetInvisible.description: Makes event invisible. It can still be interacted with and will still have collision.

LockDir.description: Prevents event from changing direction. It can still move, but it will always face the same direction.

UnlockDir.description: Allows event to change direction again.

PauseAnimation.description: Disables event's animation. It can still move, but it will not animate.

EmoteExclamationMark.description: Shows an exclamation mark above the event's head. Used commonly to indicate that the event is surprised or has noticed something.

WalkSlightlyFastNorth.description: Event faces up and walks northwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFastSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFastWest.description: Event faces right and walks westwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFastEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per 6 frames; Equivalent to 5 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterNorth.description: Event faces up and walks northwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterWest.description: Event faces left and walks westwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkSlightlyFasterEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per 3 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second.

WalkFastestNorth.description: Event faces up and walks nothwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

WalkFastestSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

WalkFastestWest.description: Event faces left and walks westwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

WalkFastestEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per frame; Equivalent to 30 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunNorth.description: Event faces up and walks northwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunSouth.description: Event faces down and walks southwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunWest.description: Event faces left and walks westwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

RunEast.description: Event faces right and walks eastwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second. Walk animation isn't triggered.

JumpNearSlowWest.description: Event faces left and jumps westwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpNearSlowEast.description: Event faces right and jumps eastwards at 1 tile per 16 frames; Equivalent to 1.875 tiles per second.

JumpFartherWest.description: Event faces left and jumps 3 tiles westwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second. 12 frames in total.

JumpFartherEast.description: Event faces right and jumps 3 tiles eastwards at 1 tile per 4 frames; Equivalent to 10 tiles per second. 12 frames in total.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastNorth.description: Event faces up and moves northwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastSouth.description: Event faces down and moves southwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastWest.description: Event faces left and moves westwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

WalkEverSoSlightlyFastEast.description: Event faces right and moves eastwards at 1 tile per 7 frames; Equivalent to 4.29 tiles per second.

NurseJoyBow.description: Nurse Joy bows. Used in the Pokémon Center.

RevealTrainer.description: Used by the ninja boys when popping out of the ground.

EmoteQuestionMark.description: Shows a double exclamation mark above the event's head.

EmoteExclamation2.description: Shows an exclamation mark above the event's head. Duplicate of EmoteExclamation (0x004B).

End.description: Action end marker. Used to indicate the end of a movement sequence.

InitScriptEntryEnd.description: comes after the last InitScript entry but before InitScriptFrameTable

InitScriptEntry_OnFrameTable.description: Before each frame of input processing, a table of conditions for the map is checked. Runs the first script where its two condition variables are equal. Therefore, any script invoked this way must at some point make its own condition false. The first check only occurs after all other init script types have run.

InitScriptEntry_OnTransition.description: Runs upon first entering a map, including when starting a new game or loading a save. Runs before all other init script types, including ON_FRAME_TABLE. Primary roles: modify object events, manage persisted map features

InitScriptEntry_OnResume.description: Runs after the map has been fully loaded and drawn. Can run again without leaving the map, e.g., when using a field move or item. Primary roles: hide the player, modify object events

InitScriptEntry_OnLoad.description: Runs after the map layout is loaded (but not drawn yet). Can run again without leaving the map, e.g., when using a field move or item. Primary roles: modify warp events, set/unset flags tied to object events

InitScriptFrameTableEnd.description: Marks the end of the frame table checks. Emits .short 0

1000.name: SEQ_DUMMY
1000.used_in: Dummy Track - Plays in Mystery Zone (Duplicate of Route 29)

1067.name: SEQ_GS_OHKIDO
1067.used_in: Professor Oak's Theme - Used in the cutscene where Oak gives you the Pokédex

1073.name: SEQ_GS_D_CHIKATSUURO
1073.used_in: General Dungeon (Johto) - Used for Ruins of Alph (Surface), Union Cave, Slowpoke Well, Ilex Forest, Whirl Islands, Mt. Mortar, Tohjo Falls, Mt. Moon

1074.name: SEQ_GS_D_UNKNOWN_ISEKI
1074.used_in: Ruins of Alph (Depths) - Where Unown Spawn

1080.name: SEQ_GS_D_KOORINONUKE
1080.used_in: Dark Cave / Ice Path / Seafoam Islands

1085.name: SEQ_GS_CHAMPROAD
1085.used_in: Indigo Plateau / Route 28 / Mt. Silver Entrance

1086.name: SEQ_GS_E_TSURETEKE1
1086.used_in: Event: Mother - Used when your mother gives you your pause menu

1087.name: SEQ_GS_E_TSURETEKE2
1087.used_in: Event: Follow Me - Used when old man gives you a tour around Cherrygrove

1090.name: SEQ_GS_TAIKAIMAE
1090.used_in: The Bug Catching Contest Begins! - Plays when you start the bug catching contest

1091.name: SEQ_GS_TAIKAIMAE_D5
1091.used_in: The Bug Catching Contest Begins! (Dungeon 5) - Plays during the rank placements announcement at the end of the bug catching contest

1103.name: SEQ_GS_OHKIDO_RABO
1103.used_in: Professor Oak's Lab, Radio: Oak's Pokémon Talk

1107.name: SEQ_GS_EYE_J_SHOUJO
1107.used_in: Eye's Meet: Lady - Used for Beauty, Pokefan , Ace Trainer F, Swimmer F

1108.name: SEQ_GS_EYE_J_SHOUNEN
1108.used_in: Eye's Meet: Boy - Used for Youngster/Camper/Bug Catcher eyes meet

1109.name: SEQ_GS_EYE_J_AYASHII
